title: Visual quality and taste audit workflow

steps.title: Set audit scope and evidence
actions: Select representative routes, state fixtures, content lengths, themes, and viewport boundaries.
Record the intended audience, task, and visual direction.
Capture reproducible screenshots from the running experience.
exit_criteria: The sample covers critical, repeated, and high-variance surfaces.

steps.title: Audit hierarchy and composition
actions: Review task dominance, reading sequence, proximity, measure, density, and responsive reflow.
Inspect in grayscale, text outline, and continuous resize.
Flag container, empty-scale, or spacing choices that substitute for hierarchy or hide proof and next actions.
exit_criteria: Every high-impact finding names the broken relationship and user consequence.

steps.title: Audit visual language and consistency
actions: Inventory type roles, color roles, spacing, radii, icons, media, surfaces, and motion.
Distinguish intentional signature from accidental drift.
Run the anti-pattern detectors and record false positives with rationale.
exit_criteria: Findings distinguish system defects from isolated polish issues.

steps.title: Audit states and inclusive behavior
actions: Check contrast, non-color cues, large text, reduced motion, forced colors, and status announcements.
Review default, loading, empty, error, success, disabled, and permission states.
exit_criteria: Critical task blockers are separated from aesthetic recommendations.

steps.title: Prioritize systemic fixes
actions: Score findings by user impact, frequency, confidence, effort, and system leverage.
Group repeated symptoms under a token, component, content, or architecture cause.
Propose the smallest coherent correction and verification method.
exit_criteria: Top recommendations are evidence-backed, actionable, and testable.

steps.title: Recheck corrections against gates
actions: Compare before and after with the same fixtures and capture settings.
Verify adjacent states and routes for regressions.
Record resolved, deferred, and rejected findings with reasons.
exit_criteria: Accepted fixes improve the named relationship without new gate regressions.
